title: Wynncraft Vanilla+
description: A modpack with some mods to make Wynncraft look nice while preserving some of the vanilla parts of the game.
body:
# Wynncraft Vanilla+ Modpack
Welcome to the Wynncraft Vanilla+ modpack, made to add some of the things that make the look nicer, preform better, but still keep the vanilla look of Wynncraft.

It also comes with Customizable Player Models so you can create/use your own player model and see other people with their model as well.

Go check out and support the devs for Wynncraft [here](https://wynncraft.com/)

# Wynncraft
![Wynncraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5591dfaec3de05a398df022c995235dfe98b6916.png)

Wynncraft is an MMORPG made in Minecraft, that started all the way back in 2013. It started off without any resource pack, and used all vanilla textures. The server even won a Guiness World Record in 2017 for largest and most detailed MMORPG in Minecraft.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WiJkohJATbA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
